content.en:
Time passes.

Ye Tian's aura has been getting stronger, he has not completely broken through yet, and his body is still transforming.

It was a long time before the metamorphosis really came to an end.

"Whew, the breakthrough is finally complete!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

And.

His breakthrough this time is very perfect, without any damage to the body, it is definitely the most perfect breakthrough, the foundation and potential of the body have reached the limit, and the future potential is unlimited.

"The first awakening of the body of reincarnation Haotian, the first boundary of the origin of the other side, the first sublimation of the will of the origin realm, with my current strength, I can directly beat the overlord of the origin upper realm who has just awakened or just broken the first boundary!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he didn't know how far his strength had really reached.

At this level, there is no specific standard, after all, he has just opened up the fourth path!

Now.

He was considering whether to publish the fourth way.

For example, the Xuanyan Society, he also made an origin oath, if he didn't announce it, it would have an impact on his cultivation in the future.

"I still have to announce it, after all, I can go out of the fourth way, and the information and information given by the Xuanyan Society also have a great effect, without this shared information, I can't know so much. "

As soon as Ye Tian thought of this, he summoned those Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Xuanyan Society.

Of course.

He also felt that even if others knew the fourth way, it would be difficult for them to break through the fourth way.

First of all, he will not sell the formula of the three-source secret medicine, but only some secret medicine, so that others who want to take the third path can only buy it from him, and they will have to spend a huge price.

In addition, even if there is a secret medicine, you have to fail I don't know how many times, and other people have not copied their bodies again and again, but they can't stand being injured again and again!

......

Town Heaven Boundary City.

Yan Zu received Ye Tian's notice.

"The Lord of Endless has summoned us to a meeting, and something important is to announce?"

Yan Zu was a little puzzled.

She's definitely going to have to go, though.

Somewhere in the middle.

Ye Tian summoned the other members of the Xuanyan Guild to be present, and as for whether they would all come, he didn't know.

Soon.

Yanzu is here.

In addition to Yan Zu, there were several other Origin Upper Realm Overlords, but there were still a few who didn't come, maybe they were in retreat and cultivating, and they didn't think Ye Tian had anything big, so they didn't come.

"Lord of Endless, what is it that summoned us this time?"

Yan Zu asked.

Ye Tian saw that the scene was almost over, and the others estimated that they would not come back for the time being, so they directly announced the start of the meeting.

"Ladies and gentlemen, I invite you to come, I have found the fourth way!"

Ye Tian said.

"The fourth path?" Yan Zu frowned, "Endless Lord, what is the fourth path?

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded in response.

"You're not kidding????" Yan Zu was shocked, and several other Origin Upper Realm Overlords also showed incredible looks.

How is this possible!

How long did it take for Ye Tiancai to break through to become the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and he found the fourth path???

Seeing that a few people didn't believe it, Ye Tian directly showed his breath.

Rumble!!!!!!

Ye Tian's body was filled with the aura of the awakening of the body of reincarnation Haotian, the breath of the origin of reincarnation Haotian breaking the first boundary, and the breath after the sublimation of the will of the origin realm, the three breaths were perfectly fused.

This power far surpassed the breath of the awakening of the Origin Ancestor Body on the other side for the first time.

Seeing this, Yan Zu had to believe it.

"Endless Lord, how did you do that?"

Yan Zu asked in shock.

Ye Tian briefly talked about his breakthrough ideas.

Yan Zu was surprised: "Endless Lord, your theory has been mentioned by the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, but it is too difficult, you can't do it at all, so you gave up, I didn't expect you to really study it!"

Immediately, they began to ask how to break through.

Knowing the theory is knowing, without the relevant inheritance, other Origin Upper Realm Overlords can't learn it!

"Ladies and gentlemen, this is the method I created, I call it the Three Reincarnation Method!"

Ye Tian took out the three-turn reincarnation method.

He didn't skimp, and directly passed on the Three Reincarnation Sect to the Origin Upper Realm Overlords present.

Soon.

When the inheritance of the Yan Ancestor ended, he couldn't help but be shocked: "Endless Lord, you are really amazing, in such a short period of time, you have studied such an incomparably mysterious method, but this method is only suitable for your reincarnation Haotian Body, this ancestral body, for other other Origin Ancestors, it cannot be copied and cultivated, it can only be used as a reference!"

Ye Tian nodded: "Yes, the three-turn reincarnation method is only suitable for me, but you can refer to him for reference, create your own method, and then cooperate with my secret medicine, the three-source secret medicine, you can still break through, but the success rate of breakthrough is very low." "

Create your own method!

Yan Zu found it difficult, even if he had the Three Reincarnation Method as a reference, he still had to spend endless years to study, and he might not be able to create it!

This is even more difficult than taking the second path of self-created methods, is there really a Origin Upper Realm Overlord who can create success?

There are also three-source secret medicines.

"Lord of Endless, can you tell us about the recipe for the three-source secret medicine?"

An Origin Upper Realm Overlord asked.

At this time, Ye Tian said lightly: "Everyone, the purpose of the Xuanyan Society is only to exchange research paths, but I didn't say that the secret medicine created should also be handed over, and the secret medicine created by you was not given to me!"

"The Lord of Endless laughed, we don't need to contribute secret medicine recipes!" Yan Zu hurriedly said.

Subsequently.

Several others began to ask for advice, and Ye Tian also pointed out step by step, but did not reveal too much.

These Origin Upper Realm Overlords want to thoroughly understand the Fourth Path, so let's go and study it slowly, anyway, he gave his own method and some experience, which is already benevolent enough!

......

Soon.

The news that Ye Tian, the Lord of Endless, had created the fourth path and had successfully broken through.

If it was an ordinary fourth path, it would be fine, but the fourth path that Ye Tian had researched was a fusion of the first three paths, which was the most perfect way to break through, and it was also the one that many Origin Upper Realm Overlords wanted the most!

For a while, there were quite a few Origin Upper Realm overlords who wanted this way of breaking through.

As a result, many people began to want to get the inheritance from Ye Tian or the Xuanyan Society.

And Yan Zu also knew that Xuanyan would not be able to keep the inheritance, so he discussed it with Ye Tian and decided to sell it, and also sold some of the three-source secret medicine.

To do this, they decided to open a simple auction.
